annotation.reason: Added a new top-level 'Stop-gap status — migrates into dw-lifecycle when ready' section right under Status/Source. Status line at the top now reads '... — stop-gap, migrates into dw-lifecycle when ready (see Stop-gap status below).' explicitly framing the whole feature as stop-gap scaffolding that lives in the deskwork plugin only because dw-lifecycle doesn't yet expose customizable/overridable lifecycle stages.
